title: fix for Florence-2 space
body:
previously Florence2 had flash attention as a requirement due to an error in *transformers* (issue with packages Forge uses rather than in Forge itself) (https://huggingface.co/microsoft/Florence-2-base/discussions/4#6673ffb9436907f83a8aaf2d); the workaround was to patch the imports to remove it (https://huggingface.co/microsoft/phi-1_5/discussions/72#65a0339f64520347aa3d703c).
At some point, an update has made this patch unnecessary. And turned it into an error.

This PR simply removes the patch.

Now the Space loads again; tested a couple of functions as working correctly too.

#2299

step_plan.summary: Removes the now-broken Florence-2 HuggingFace Space workaround that monkey-patched `transformers` import detection to drop `flash_attn`. The Space will rely on upstream `transformers` behavior again so the app loads and inference functions work under updated dependencies.

steps.operation: Remove the Florence-2 `transformers.dynamic_module_utils.get_imports` monkey-patch by deleting the helper function and updating the model-loading code path to call `from_pretrained(..., trust_remote_code=True)` directly (and remove related patch/import statements).
steps.reason: The `fixed_get_imports` workaround (removing `flash_attn` from dynamically detected imports) was previously needed due to an upstream `transformers` packaging/import quirk, but is now unnecessary and has become the source of runtime errors. Removing the helper and the `unittest.mock.patch(...)` usage restores normal `transformers` behavior so the Space can load again.
steps.side_effects: If the Space is run with older `transformers` versions that still mis-detect `flash_attn` as required for Florence-2 remote code, model loading may fail again; however this aligns with the PR intent and current dependency set. Also ensure removal of patch-related imports doesn’t break linting (unused imports) and that the GPU capture/context (`spaces.capture_gpu_object()` / `@spaces.GPU`) remains unchanged. Functional smoke tests should include launching the Space and running at least one captioning/OCR/OD call to confirm model initialization and inference still succeed.
